whatHappened.text: launched, xAI's fastest and most token-efficient model yet
hit general availability in a three-tier family
shipped its first-ever paid API model
Every lab made the same pitch this week: price, not capability

whyYouShouldCare.text: Unit economics shifted to cost per task, not cost per token
Agentic workflows burn 150K to 200K tokens, so routing matters
to one vendor, build a model portfolio instead
Route cheap models for volume, premium models only for hard tasks

comparisonTable.title: Frontier Model Pricing — July 2026 (USD per 1M tokens)

whyItMatters: The price gap between budget and premium models is now roughly 6x for the same task. The engineers who win this year are the ones who route intelligently: cheap models for the 80 percent of easy work, premium models only where quality genuinely matters. Vendor loyalty is now a cost, not a virtue.
